Ideka, Esq. of Orrick, Herrington, & Sutcliffe LLP (415) 773-5922, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for Summary Adjudication granted as to issues one, two, and three that are unopposed. Motion denied as to issues four and five. CCP section 437c(f)(1) does not permit summary adjudication of a single item of compensatory damage which does not dispose of an entire cause of action.
